creator: hardy.schumacher@globalfoundries.com
text:
Port graphics/mesa-demos does not build on FreeBSD-7.2 i386 with installed NVidia-Driver. Installation was also tested on FreeBSD-7.1 i386 with NVidia-Driver and it failed too.

On FreeBSD-7.2 AMD64 with ATI graphics it works without issues.
